task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the exterior photo of a house inserted into the document, located just below the 1st paragraph (Property Overview).

task_completion.description: Format exterior.jpg with Square wrap, 3-inch width, and Alt Text
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Picture Tools ribbon showing width set to 3", 'Square' text wrapping selected, or the Format Picture dialog showing Alt Text 'Front exterior view...'. Visually, the text should wrap squarely around the image.
Screenshot shows the interior photo (living room) inserted into the document, located just below the 3rd paragraph (Interior Features).

task_completion.description: Format interior.jpg with Tight wrap, 2.5-inch width, and Alt Text
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Picture Tools ribbon showing width set to 2.5", 'Tight' text wrapping selected, or the Format Picture dialog showing Alt Text 'Living room interior...'. Visually, the text should wrap closely around the image.
Screenshot shows the floor plan image inserted into the document, located just below the 5th paragraph (Floor Plan).

task_completion.description: Format floorplan.jpg with Top and Bottom wrap, 5-inch width, centered, and Alt Text
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Picture Tools ribbon showing width set to 5", 'Top and Bottom' text wrapping selected, horizontal centering applied, or the Format Picture dialog showing Alt Text 'Floor plan layout...'. Visually, the image should be centered with text only above and below it.
Screenshot shows the agent clicking the Save icon (floppy disk) in the Quick Access Toolbar, navigating to File > Save, or pressing Ctrl+S.

integrity.description: The agent used Microsoft Word 2010 to perform the task
integrity.visual_evidence: The Microsoft Word 2010 interface is visible in the screenshots, not a different word processor like WordPad or Google Docs.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Word GUI to insert and format images
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent using the ribbon, dialog boxes, and context menus to format the images, rather than using scripts or terminal commands.

integrity.description: The agent inserted images from the specified 'Documents\PropertyPhotos' folder
integrity.visual_evidence: The Insert Picture dialog box shows the agent navigating to 'Documents\PropertyPhotos' to select the images.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires inserting three images into PropertyReport.docx: 1) exterior.jpg: Placed after 1st paragraph, 3-inch width, 'Square' text wrapping, Alt Text containing 'exterior'. 2) interior.jpg: Placed after 3rd paragraph, 2.5-inch width, 'Tight' text wrapping, Alt Text containing 'interior'. 3) floorplan.jpg: Placed after 5th paragraph, 5-inch width, 'Top and Bottom' text wrapping, centered horizontally, Alt Text containing 'floor plan'. A 15% tolerance applies to image width verification.
